note: v309: Settings responsive fixes across breakpoints. The two-pane (section nav + panel) now only turns on at 1000px+ — below that every section stacks in a single centered column, so it never engages cramped on small laptops or landscape phones. The sticky section nav clears the topbar instead of sliding under it, switching sections fades the new panel in and resets the scroll to its top, and stacked sections are width-capped so a single-toggle section doesn't stretch.
